title: Visual Systems & Brand Architecture
author: Elena Lysander
description: Master the art of building cohesive visual systems and scalable brand architectures that communicate across every touchpoint.

title: Scalable Frontend Architecture
author: Julian Marks
description: Deep dive into modern frontend patterns, component systems, and performance optimization strategies for large-scale applications.

title: The Psychology of Interaction
author: Sarah Vance
description: Explore the cognitive and emotional principles behind human-computer interaction and learn how to design experiences that feel effortless.

title: Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
author: Marcus Chen
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch. Build real-world projects using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, and databases.

title: Machine Learning Foundations
author: Priya Nair
description: Grasp the core concepts of machine learning, from supervised and unsupervised algorithms to model evaluation and deployment pipelines.

title: Product Thinking & Roadmapping
author: Liam Okafor
description: Develop product intuition, learn prioritization frameworks, and practice building roadmaps that align stakeholders and drive measurable outcomes.
imageUrl: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 260' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Crect width='400' height='260' fill='%231a1200'/%3E%3Crect x='40' y='50' width='320' height='160' rx='10' fill='%23ff8f00' opacity='0.1' stroke='%23ff8f00' stroke-width='2' opacity='0.4'/%3E%3Crect x='60' y='70' width='90' height='56' rx='6' fill='%23ff6f00' opacity='0.7'/%3E%3Crect x='60' y='140' width='90' height='56' rx='6' fill='%23f9a825' opacity='0.5'/%3E%3Crect x='164' y='70' width='90' height='56' rx='6' fill='%23f9a825' opacity='0.6'/%3E%3Crect x='164' y='140' width='90' height='56' rx='6' fill='%23ff8f00' opacity='0.4'/%3E%3Crect x='268' y='70' width='76' height='126' rx='6' fill='%23ffb300' opacity='0.8'/%3E%3Ctext x='105' y='102' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='white' font-family='sans-serif'%3EVision%3C/text%3E%3Ctext x='209' y='102' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='white' font-family='sans-serif'%3EStrategy%3C/text%3E%3Ctext x='306' y='136' text-anchor='middle' font-size='14' fill='white' font-family='sans-serif'%3ERoadmap%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E

title: User Research Methods & Synthesis
author: Aiko Tanaka
description: Learn qualitative and quantitative research techniques — from user interviews to usability testing — and turn insights into actionable design decisions.

title: Cloud-Native DevOps & CI/CD
author: Rodrigo Ferreira
description: Master Docker, Kubernetes, and modern CI/CD pipelines. Deploy, scale, and monitor cloud-native applications with confidence.

title: Design Thinking for Innovators
author: Nina Wolff
description: Apply the five stages of design thinking — empathize, define, ideate, prototype, and test — to solve complex real-world problems creatively.

title: Data Visualization & Storytelling
author: Ethan Brooks
description: Transform raw data into compelling narratives using tools like D3.js, Tableau, and Python. Learn to communicate insights that influence decisions.
